title: Developing a Disaster Recovery Plan
scenario: Develop a disaster recovery plan for a large healthcare organization with multiple hospitals and clinics. The plan must include procedures for data backup, system recovery, and business continuity. The output should be a comprehensive document in PDF format.
constraints: Must use a RACI matrix to assign roles and responsibilities
Must include a detailed table with recovery timelines and processes

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the plan have a clear logical structure and organization?
Does the plan adhere to the specified constraints?
Does the plan include disaster recovery best practices and standards?
Is the tone professional, concise, and free of errors?
